nodes.name: Webhook: Gabriel Evidence Request
nodes.notes: Gabriel triggers this when an artifact is ready for truth-binding. Expects: { artifact_id, artifact_type, artifact_title, artifact_format, duration_seconds, creator_id, creator_name, usage_type, asset_ref, gross_amount, currency, contributors: [{ contributor_id, display_name, role, share_of_artist_pool }], allowed_uses, blocked_uses, echo: { title, narrative, moment_type, tags, mood } }

nodes.name: HTTP: Run Consent Cascade
nodes.notes: Calls the consent-cascade workflow. Must return 'cleared' status or the entire pipeline halts.

nodes.name: HTTP: Generate 75/25 Receipt
nodes.notes: Calls receipt-generator workflow. Returns HybridReceipt75_25 with calculated splits.

nodes.name: HTTP: Generate Provenance Manifest
nodes.notes: Calls provenance-signer workflow. Returns signed ProvenanceManifest with SHA-256 integrity hash.

parameters.name: sql
parameters.value: INSERT INTO consent_log (id, action, details, created_at) VALUES ('={{$json.bundle_id}}', 'EVIDENCE_GENERATED', '={{JSON.stringify({bundle_id: $json.bundle_id, manifest_id: $json.truth_strip.provenance.manifest_id, receipt_id: $json.truth_strip.receipt_75_25.receipt_id, echo_id: $json.echo_moment.echo_id, initiated_by: $json._pipeline_meta.initiated_by})}}', '={{$json.created_at}}')

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: ={{JSON.stringify([{role: 'system', content: 'You are GABRIEL. An evidence bundle was just generated. Confirm it in one sentence. Be warm, musical, and brief.'}, {role: 'user', content: 'Evidence bundle ' + $json.bundle_id + ' is assembled. Consent: ' + $json.truth_strip.consent.status + '. Receipt: ' + $json.truth_strip.receipt_75_25.status + '. Provenance: ' + $json.truth_strip.provenance.status + '. Risk: ' + $json.truth_strip.risk.level + '.'}])}}

nodes.name: HTTP: Gabriel Confirmation (Ollama)
nodes.notes: Gabriel acknowledges the evidence bundle. Non-blocking — pipeline succeeds even if Ollama is offline.
